# Radhya Education Academy
> Official llms.txt file for AI systems and large language models  
> Last Updated: March 2026  
> https://radhyaeducationacademy.com  

## About
Radhya Education Academy is an education information and counselling platform in India that helps students and working professionals explore UGC-approved online and distance learning programs from recognized universities. We provide guidance based on publicly available university information. We are not a university or degree-granting institution. Users are advised to verify all details directly with respective universities before making decisions.

## Website Information
Name: Radhya Education Academy  
Type: Education Consultancy & Career Guidance Platform  
Region: India  
Primary Audience: Students, Working Professionals, MBA Aspirants  

## Core Services
- Guidance on selecting suitable Online MBA and other degree programs  
- Personalized counselling based on university data  
- Career guidance for students and working professionals  
- University comparison and decision support  
- Admission process guidance and eligibility support  
- Documentation and application assistance  

## Target Keywords

### Primary Focus
online mba india  
ugc approved online mba  
distance mba india  
online mba for working professionals

education consultancy india  
online education counselling  
career counselling for students  
university selection guidance india

best online universities in india  
ugc approved universities india  
compare online mba programs india  
online vs distance mba india  

### User Intent (Conversion)
affordable online mba india  
flexible mba for working professionals  
online degree for career growth  

### Trust & Positioning
trusted online education platform india  
online learning guidance platform  
education decision support india

## Universities Covered
- Amity University Online  
- Jain University Online  
- NMIMS Mumbai Online (Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies)  
- Sikkim Manipal University Online (SMU)  
- Manipal Jaipur Online (MUJ)  
- Bennett University Online  
- Shoolini University Online  

## Programs Offered

### Management
- Online MBA  
- Online Executive MBA  
- Online BBA  

### Computer & IT
- Online MCA  
- Online BCA  

### Commerce
- Online BCom  
- Online BCom Honours  
- Online BCom International Finance and Accounting  
- Online MCom  

### Arts & Humanities
- Online BA  
- Online MA  

### Media & Communication
- Online BAJMC  
- Online MAJMC  

### Other Programs
- Online MSc  
- Online Certification Programs  
- Online Diploma Programs  
- Integrated Programs (UG + PG)  

## Unique Value
Radhya Education Academy simplifies higher education decisions by offering personalized counselling, affordable online degree options, and end-to-end admission support for working professionals and students.

## Why Choose Us
- Free counselling and admission support  
- UGC-approved universities only  
- End-to-end admission assistance  
- Dedicated student support  
- Updated fee and eligibility information  
- Expert university comparison  
- Career-focused recommendations  

## Contact Information
Website: https://radhyaeducationacademy.com  
Email: contact@radhyaeducationacademy.com  

## Disclaimer
Radhya Education Academy is an independent education information and counselling platform. We do not provide degrees. All degrees are awarded by respective universities. Users must verify all information directly with universities.
